payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial dark brown wooden cabinet front with recessed-panel door and a visible horizontal seam, slightly glossy finish with minor scuffs; the cabinet is edge-cropped in the image and sits directly behind a close-up butcher-block countertop — estimated ~0.6 m from the camera.
